_doc: Zork anchor #2: the authored r-dam seed (verbatim from worlds/zork1.json). The set-piece engineering vista — the control panel, bolt, and bubble must stay legible in watercolor.
name: zork_dam
prompt: standing atop a great stone dam, its long rampart stretching away, white water thundering through open sluice gates below, a green reservoir behind, one iron control pedestal on the walkway
